recipes.title: Boiled Eggs with Broth
recipes.description: Simple breakfast with boiled eggs and nutritious broth to start your day with energy.
instructions: Place eggs and cook for 10 minutes
Remove and place in cold water
Heat the broth and serve with the eggs
recipes.nutritionTip: Eggs contain essential amino acids. The broth provides collagen for intestinal healing.

recipes.title: Squash Porridge
recipes.description: Comforting breakfast with cooked squash and broth, perfect for sensitive intestines.
instructions: Cook in chicken broth until warm
recipes.nutritionTip: Squash is rich in carotenoids that promote intestinal mucosa. Easy to digest.

recipes.title: Cooked Fruits
recipes.description: Breakfast with fruits cooked in broth for better digestion.
instructions: Place in a pot with water
recipes.nutritionTip: Cooked fruits are more digestible than raw. Ginger aids digestion.

recipes.title: Herb Omelet
recipes.description: Quick and protein-rich breakfast with fresh omelet and aromatic herbs.
instructions: Heat ghee in a frying pan
recipes.nutritionTip: Eggs are complete source of protein and choline. Herbs add minerals.

recipes.title: Papa de Banana
recipes.description: Comforting breakfast with cooked banana, gentle for the intestines.
instructions: Cook whole banana for 5 minutes in water
recipes.nutritionTip: Cooked banana provides potassium and is easily digested. Resistant starch favors good bacteria.

recipes.title: Vegetable Broth
recipes.description: Lanche matinal nutritivo com caldo caseiro de legumes.
instructions: Strain if you prefer just broth
recipes.nutritionTip: Legumes cozidos liberam nutrientes no caldo. Rico em minerais e baixo em carboidratos.

recipes.title: Chicken Broth with Ginger
recipes.description: Therapeutic broth with anti-inflammatory properties for morning snack.
instructions: Cook chicken in water for 20 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Ginger reduces inflammation. Chicken provides protein and easily absorbed collagen.

recipes.title: Apple Tea
recipes.description: Warm and comforting drink with cooked apple for morning snack.
recipes.nutritionTip: Cooked apple provides pectin that favors beneficial bacteria. Cinnamon regulates blood sugar.

recipes.title: Alfalfa Sprouts
recipes.description: Lanche leve com broto nutritivo rico em enzimas vivas.
recipes.nutritionTip: Sprouts contain live enzymes that facilitate digestion. Rich in B vitamins.

recipes.title: Meat Meatballs with Squash
recipes.description: Protein-rich lunch with homemade meatball and cooked squash side.
instructions: Misture carne com cebola e alho
Doure em ghee quente por 10 minutos
Cook squash in water separately for 15 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Quality protein with minerals. Meat nourishes intestines with L-glutamine.

recipes.title: Chicken with Broccoli
recipes.description: Simple lunch with cooked chicken and al dente broccoli.
instructions: Cook chicken in water for 20 minutes
Heat ghee and season chicken with lemon and salt
recipes.nutritionTip: Broccoli is rich in sulforaphane that protects intestinal mucosa. Chicken provides essential amino acids.

recipes.title: Fish with Carrot
recipes.description: Delicate lunch with cooked fish and warm carrot.
instructions: Cook carrot in water for 15 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Fish is rich in omega-3 that reduces intestinal inflammation. Carrot provides beta-carotene.

recipes.title: Shredded Meat Sauté
recipes.description: Comforting lunch with shredded meat in mild sauce.
instructions: Cook meat in water for 1 hour
recipes.nutritionTip: Slowly cooked meat releases collagen and nutrients. Tomato provides antioxidant lycopene.

recipes.title: Sprout with Coconut Oil
recipes.description: Lanche da tarde leve com broto e gordura de qualidade.
instructions: Add coconut oil at room temperature
recipes.nutritionTip: Coconut oil is anti-inflammatory. Sprouts provide live enzymes for excellent digestion.

recipes.title: Carrot and Beet Juice
recipes.description: Suco fresco cozido para lanche da tarde com tons de terra.
instructions: Cut carrot and beet into small pieces
Cook in water with ginger for 10 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Beet contains betaine that improves digestion. Carrot provides protective carotenoids.

recipes.title: Flavored Water
recipes.description: Bebida refrescante com ervas para lanche da tarde.
recipes.nutritionTip: Mint promotes digestion. Lemon aids mineral absorption.

recipes.title: Chicken Broth with Rosemary
recipes.description: Aromatic broth for afternoon snack with calming properties.
instructions: Bring to high heat until boiling
recipes.nutritionTip: Rosemary has antioxidants. Chicken offers gelatin for intestinal health.

recipes.title: Meat in Broth
recipes.description: Nutritious and comforting dinner with meat cooked in its own broth.
instructions: Bring to high heat until boiling
Cozinhe por 1,5 hora em fogo baixo
Serve meat in its own broth
recipes.nutritionTip: Homemade broth is foundation of intestinal healing. Maximum collagen and L-glutamine.

recipes.title: Chicken with Cauliflower
recipes.description: Jantar leve com frango e couve-flor assada delicadamente.
instructions: Cook chicken in water for 20 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Cauliflower is rich in sulfur that improves detoxification. Low in carbs.

recipes.title: Fish with Asparagus
recipes.description: Jantar elegante e nutritivo com peixe cozido e aspargo morno.
instructions: Cook asparagus in water for 8 minutes
Cook fish in water with lemon for 12 minutes
Saltear aspargo em ghee por 3 minutos
recipes.nutritionTip: Asparagus is natural diuretic. White fish is delicate for sensitive intestines.

recipes.title: Nutritious Beef Broth
recipes.description: Concentrated broth for dinner with maximum nutrient concentration.
instructions: Bring to high heat until boiling
Reduza fogo e cozinhe por 4-6 horas
recipes.nutritionTip: Long-cooked broth extracts collagen, minerals and essential L-glutamine for deep intestinal healing.

recipes.title: Peru com Legumes-Raiz
recipes.description: Jantar reconfortante com peru cozido e legumes-raiz nutritivos.
instructions: Cook turkey in water for 25 minutes
Cook vegetables in water for 20 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Sweet potato provides resistant starch for beneficial bacteria. Turkey is nutritious lean protein.

recipes.title: Chicken Curry with Squash and Beef Broth
recipes.description: Recipe from the e-book with tender chicken in aromatic curry sauce with sweet squash.
instructions: Sauté onion in ghee until golden
Add curry powder and stir for 1 minute
Cook for 20 minutes until squash is warm
recipes.nutritionTip: Curry is potent anti-inflammatory. Squash provides carotenoids. Broth nourishes intestinal recovery.

recipes.title: Chicken Fricassee (GAPS)
recipes.description: Receita tradicional do e-book com frango cozido em molho cremoso de caldo.
instructions: Despeje caldo e cozinhe por 20 minutos
recipes.nutritionTip: Yolk provides choline for brain and intestinal health. Broth offers healing gelatin.

recipes.title: Chicken Meatballs with Mint (GAPS)
recipes.description: Delicate meatballs from the e-book with chicken and refreshing mint aroma.
instructions: Mix ground chicken with mint and chopped onion
recipes.nutritionTip: Mint promotes digestion and reduces inflammation. Chicken offers easily absorbed protein.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken with Rosemary and Lemon (GAPS)
recipes.description: Simple and healthy chicken from the e-book with Mediterranean herb aroma.
instructions: Coloque frango em panela com ghee
Cook on medium-high heat for 20 minutes
recipes.nutritionTip: Rosemary is potent antioxidant. Lemon facilitates iron absorption. Chicken offers vitamin B12.

recipes.title: Mexican Chicken GAPS with Peppers and Fresh Cilantro
recipes.description: Frango do e-book com toque latino nutritivo respeitando protocolo GAPS.
instructions: Sauté onion and peppers in ghee
Cook for 15 minutes until chicken is done
recipes.nutritionTip: Peppers offer antioxidant vitamin C. Cilantro aids in heavy metal chelation.

recipes.title: Frango Recheado com Vegetais e Ervas
recipes.description: Whole stuffed chicken from the e-book with nutritious vegetables for complete meal.
instructions: Preencha cavidade do frango com recheio
Doure frango de todos os lados
Cozinhe em fogo baixo por 1,5 hora
Deixe descansar 10 minutos antes de servir
recipes.nutritionTip: Complete meal with protein, vegetables and quality fat. Cooking broth is nutritious.

recipes.title: Loin Stuffed with Spinach, Garlic and Mint
recipes.description: Corte premium do e-book recheado com vegetais verdes para jantar elegante.
instructions: Refogue espinafre com alho em ghee
Cozinhe em fogo baixo por 45 minutos
recipes.nutritionTip: Red meat offers iron, B12 and creatine. Spinach provides magnesium and vitamins.

recipes.title: Carne de Porco Desfiada ao Molho de Tomate (Pulled Pork com toque caseiro)
recipes.description: Carne do e-book cozida lentamente em molho GAPS para textura morna e suave.
instructions: Doure em ghee de todos os lados
Reduza fogo e cozinhe por 3 horas cobertin
recipes.nutritionTip: Long cooking extracts collagen. Tomato offers lycopene. Perfect for sensitive intestines.

recipes.title: Lombinho de Porco ao Molho de Mostarda
recipes.description: Succulent cut from the e-book with natural aromatic sauce for fine dinner.
instructions: Doure lombinho em ghee de ambos os lados
Cozinhe em fogo baixo por 30 minutos
recipes.nutritionTip: Mustard aids digestion. Pork offers B vitamins. Broth provides collagen.

recipes.title: Shrimp with Garlic, Ghee and Lemon
recipes.description: Delicate shellfish from the e-book cooked in ghee with garlic and lemon aroma.
recipes.nutritionTip: Shrimp is rich in minerals and low in carbs. Great for sensitive intestines.

recipes.title: Fish Stew Traditional
recipes.description: Traditional dish from the e-book with fish in mild aromatic sauce.
instructions: Cook for 12 minutes until fish is done
recipes.nutritionTip: Fish offers anti-inflammatory omega-3. Tomato provides lycopene. Sauce nourishes intestines.

recipes.title: Zucchini Puree with Ghee
recipes.description: Acompanhamento cremoso do e-book com abobrinha cozida.
recipes.nutritionTip: Zucchini is hydrating and easy to digest. Ghee provides anti-inflammatory fat.

recipes.title: Carrot Puree with Beef Broth
recipes.description: Acompanhamento nutritivo do e-book com cenoura em caldo.
recipes.nutritionTip: Cenoura cozida libera beta-caroteno. Caldo fornece minerais e gelatina curativa.
